summary: Plan-only result. No GitHub mutations are permitted. None of the five listed PRs has complete merge preflight: all are missing a passed Codex /review merge gate, several are draft, and #89142 has a failing Real behavior proof check. The prior fix_needed actions were not safely executable because this result has no complete bounded fix_artifact; the PRs are retained as related non-mutating classifications for maintainer follow-up or a later executable repair plan.
